creator: linda@kateley.com
text:
Kateley Company
kateleyco.com
info@kateleyco.com

Design of Enterprise Open-ZFS Solutions

We have many years experience architecting and designing open-zfs systems for
enterprise class workloads. We can assist in all parts of your project. Sizing,
planning, hardware purchase, software acquisition, install, implementation,
training, runbooks and monitoring.

Custom Classes

Our primary business is open-zfs, freebsd and opensolaris training, but we are
experts on technical content creation and delivery. We can create your content
and take our classes onto your site or deliver online. We also will create
one-time use classes and create a specific class for your team. We are small
and nimble, let us know what your needs are.
